task: Remove the black glove from near the keyboard and put it on top of the other glove on the yellow towel
raw:
Scene: black_glove, yellow_towel, keyboard, table
Step 1: reach(black_glove)
  affordance_region: the black glove on the table
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_glove, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_glove) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(black_glove)
  affordance_region: the black glove
  contact: holding(black_glove) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_glove)
Step 3: transport(black_glove -> yellow_towel)
  affordance_region: the empty area on the yellow towel
  spatial: above(black_glove, yellow_towel, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_glove)
  done_when: above(black_glove, yellow_towel, 0.05)
Step 4: place(black_glove -> yellow_towel)
  affordance_region: the empty area on the yellow towel
  contact: surface_contact(black_glove, yellow_towel) [completion]; released(black_glove) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_glove) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_glove, yellow_towel) AND released(black_glove) AND stable(black_glove)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the black glove on the table
the empty area on the yellow towel
the empty area on the yellow towel
steps.done_when: surface_contact(black_glove, yellow_towel) AND released(black_glove) AND stable(black_glove)
